footer.brandSubtitle: Professional journeys for business and leisure.
footer.description: Plan hotels, transport, and curated packages with a frontend designed for clear traveler experiences and scalable agency workflows.

bottom.rights: Atlas Travel Agency. All rights reserved.
bottom.tagline: Designed for modern booking, planning, and traveler support.

hero.title: Professional travel booking for hotels, transport, and memorable journeys.
hero.description: Atlas Travel helps agencies and independent travelers move from searching to booking with a clear, elegant interface built for confidence and speed.
hero.highlightDescription: A polished travel flow with flights, airport transfers, and a premium city stay.

services.title: Travel services designed around real booking needs.
services.description: From flights and hotels to curated packages and ongoing support, the experience is built to feel trustworthy, efficient, and easy to navigate.

flights.title: Flights
flights.description: Organize reliable departures, ticketing, and flight options for business or leisure.

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.description: Match travelers with curated properties, clean room options, and strong location value.

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Bundle stays, transport, and activities into memorable travel programs.

support.title: Support
support.description: Keep travelers informed with responsive assistance before, during, and after each trip.

whyChooseUs.title: A dependable travel partner for business trips and premium escapes.
whyChooseUs.description: The interface is structured to support confident decisions, realistic travel planning, and a professional agency presentation.

itinerary.title: Experienced itinerary design
itinerary.description: We combine destination knowledge with business-ready planning so every trip feels intentional.

coordination.title: Fast booking coordination
coordination.description: Hotels, transport, and traveler details are organized clearly for quicker confirmations.

care.title: Consistent traveler care
care.description: Our process is built to reduce friction, manage changes, and keep journeys on track.

destinations.title: Popular offers that make your agency feel ready for real customers.
destinations.description: These highlighted destination cards show how featured trips or promotional offers can be presented in a modern travel storefront.

marrakech.name: Marrakech Escape
marrakech.description: A premium city break with boutique stays, cultural tours, and guided medina experiences.

paris.name: Paris Business Stopover
paris.description: Smart central accommodation and smooth transfers for meetings, conferences, and executive travel.

dubai.name: Dubai Premium Break
dubai.description: Luxury city views, airport assistance, and curated transport for high-comfort travel plans.

cta.title: Ready to turn this polished UI into a full booking flow?
cta.description: The frontend is now shaped like a realistic agency platform, making it easier to connect forms, search filters, and live API data next.

aside.title: Sign in to manage travelers and bookings.
aside.description: Access reservations, hotel inquiries, transport requests, and client updates from one central dashboard.

checklist.review: Review upcoming itineraries and booking requests.
checklist.track: Track hotels, transport, and traveler support tasks.
checklist.organize: Keep your agency workflow organized across every destination.

card.title: Welcome back
card.description: Sign in with your agency email to continue planning and managing trips.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

success.message: Login form submitted successfully. You can connect this flow to the Django API next.

aside.title: Register your agency and start building polished travel experiences.
aside.description: Set up your account to manage hotel selections, transport coordination, and customer communication from one place.

checklist.access: Organize team access and client communication in one dashboard.
checklist.offers: Prepare package offers, reservations, and transport bookings faster.
checklist.scale: Scale from mock data today to real API-driven workflows next.

card.title: Create your account
card.description: Fill in the fields below to set up a travel-agency workspace.

form.passwordHint: Use at least {{count}} characters for a secure password.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{count}} characters long.

success.message: Registration form submitted successfully. It is ready to connect to your Django API.

notFound.title: This destination is not on the map yet.
notFound.description: The page you requested may have moved or does not exist. Head back to the main experience and continue exploring hotels, transport, and travel offers.

hotels.pageTitle: Curated stays for business travel, city breaks, and premium vacations.
hotels.intro: This listing page uses realistic hotel cards, strong hierarchy, and a clean filter layout so it already feels close to a production booking experience.

filters.title: Search accommodations
filters.description: Search by destination, stay dates, and budget range. The fields are UI-only for now and ready to connect to future backend filtering.

hotels.summary: {{count}} curated hotel options ready for search and detail pages.

descriptions.atlasMarina: Modern waterfront rooms, fast check-in, and direct access to key business districts.
descriptions.riadLumiere: Elegant riad interiors with spa access, curated excursions, and intimate courtyard dining.
descriptions.blueHorizon: Spacious suites near the port with flexible bookings for couples and work trips alike.
descriptions.skylineGrand: High-rise comfort with airport pickup options, premium lounges, and skyline dining.
descriptions.seineResidence: A polished central stay built for short business visits, events, and quick city access.
descriptions.costaSol: Bright coastal rooms with local experiences, easy transfers, and flexible stay packages.

transports.pageTitle: Compare flights, trains, and transfer options in one polished booking view.
transports.intro: The transport page now behaves like a realistic reservation screen, combining route filters with a structured list of available services.

filters.title: Search transport options
filters.description: Choose a departure point, destination, date, and transport type. This is a clean frontend-only filter UI, ready for backend integration later.

transports.summary: {{count}} transport options displayed with route, date, and pricing details.

notes.atlasAirConnect: Direct evening departure with business-friendly schedule.
notes.maghrebRail: Comfortable city-to-city connection with lounge access.
notes.saharaLine: Affordable transfer with reserved seating and onboard Wi-Fi.
notes.blueSky: Long-haul option with generous baggage allowance.
notes.euroCity: Fast intercity rail with priority boarding and quiet carriages.
notes.atlasShuttle: Reliable arrival transfer option for solo travelers and groups.
